plugins.name: 1coos-markdown-converter-plugin
plugins.description: Convert files (PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, HTML, CSV, JSON, XML, images, audio, EPub) to beautifully formatted Markdown. Uses uvx markitdown[all] for conversion with github/commonmark/clean/obsidian style formatting. TRIGGER when user asks to convert a file to Markdown, extract text from PDF/DOCX/PPTX/XLSX, or format a document as Markdown.
